diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was confirmed by the detection of Cyclospora oocysts in stool specimens using microscopic examination and autofluorescence under UV light. The clinical presentation included non-bloody or watery diarrhea, abdominal pain, and weight loss, which are consistent with cyclosporiasis. The differential diagnoses of cryptosporidiosis and giardiasis were considered due to similar clinical presentations but were ruled out based on specific laboratory findings.
